ResearchProjectDef.label: unique machining
ResearchProjectDef.description: Upgrade and customize industrial-era weapons at a machining table, adding or removing traits to suit your needs.

customUnlockTexts.li: Upgrade and customize industrial unique weapons

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->reverse-engineered unique weapon modifications using industrial tools
subject_story->perfected the art of applying weapon traits with precision machinery
